S.FORM: Picudadan Maolah kako a talapicudan,minanam a miasip to cudad, romadiw masakero'.lipahak kako to romi'ami'ad.
S.PHON: pi ¶o~u~u…¨~…Æa…¨~…Æan mao~u…æaƒß kako~u a ta…æapi ¶o~u~u…¨~…Æan,minanam a miasip to~u ¶o~u~u…¨~…Æa…¨~…Æ, ro~uma…¨~…Æiw masak…ôro~u °.…æipaƒßak kako~u to~u ro~umi °ami °a…¨~…Æ.
